qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, c.c_tipo_concepto, SEC.policy FROM LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS c, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC
JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id, c.oi_tipo_concepto inner t.oi_tipo_concepto
WHERE t.oi_concepto={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} and c.c_tipo_concepto IN (\'6\', \'9\')
ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, SEC.policy, c.c_tipo_concepto FROM LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS c, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id, c.oi_tipo_concepto inner t.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE t.c_concepto={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} and c.c_tipo_concepto IN (\'6\', \'9\') ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, SEC.policy , c.c_tipo_concepto FROM LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS c, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id, c.oi_tipo_concepto inner t.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE c.c_tipo_concepto IN (\'6\', \'9\') ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
